overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Horizon Forbidden West, beginning with an aerial drone shot ascending from a campsite through a red rock canyon to the sky, then cutting to third-person gameplay of a warrior character walking through a forested trail beside a river.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned campsite with fabric tents in rocky canyon

agents.ego_description: aerial camera slowly ascending over an abandoned campsite with tattered tents

entered.detail: weathered green canvas tent with wooden pole supports
tan canvas tent with draped fabric sides
red and orange striped fabric canopy in foreground
low crumbling stone wall surrounding the camp area
wooden supply crate near the tent
scattered pine trees on the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The video opens with an aerial view of an abandoned campsite nestled in a rocky canyon. Weathered fabric tents in green, beige, and red stripes are visible among stone ruins and scattered pine trees, with the camera slowly ascending to reveal more of the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: red rock canyon vista with waterfall

events.description: camera pans up from campsite to reveal towering red canyon walls and distant waterfall

agents.ego_description: camera continuing to ascend revealing the vast red rock canyon landscape

entered.detail: tall sheer cliff face of red sandstone on the left side
tall sheer cliff face of red sandstone on the right side
waterfall cascading down the distant canyon wall

segments.scene_description: As the camera ascends, the campsite drops away to reveal a magnificent red rock canyon. Towering sandstone cliffs frame the view on both sides, with a distant waterfall visible cascading down the canyon wall in the center background.

events.description: frame fills with cloudy sky as canyon walls move to edges of view

agents.ego_description: camera looking straight up at the dramatic clouds between the canyon cliffs

entered.detail: dramatic white and gray cumulus clouds against blue sky

segments.scene_description: The camera continues tilting upward until the frame is dominated by a dramatic cloudy sky. The red canyon walls slide to the bottom edges and exit view, leaving only the expansive sky with scattered clouds.

events.description: hard cut to third-person perspective following a character walking through forested area
character continues walking along path navigating around rocks and vegetation

agents.ego_description: female warrior with braided red hair and bow walking along a dirt path beside a green river

notable_agents.action: protagonist walking steadily along the trail with bow on back, navigating through forest terrain

entered.detail: winding dirt path through the forest with scattered rocks
emerald green river flowing alongside the trail
tall pine trees lining both sides of the trail
ancient stone wall ruins running parallel to the path
red and orange fern bushes along the trail edge
large moss-covered boulder beside the path

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to third-person gameplay following a red-haired warrior walking along a dirt trail beside an emerald green river. The character moves steadily through a forested area with pine trees, stone ruins, and red ferns, navigating around large boulders and uneven terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a grounded aerial view of a canyon settlement that ascends into the open sky before shifting to a grounded perspective of a forested riverbank. It begins by rising slowly from an abandoned campsite of weathered fabric tents and stone ruins nestled among pine trees. As the camera ascends, the campsite drops away to reveal a magnificent red rock canyon framed by towering sandstone cliffs and a distant cascading waterfall. The view then tilts further upward until the canyon walls slide out of frame, leaving only an expansive, cloudy sky before the perspective shifts to follow a red-haired warrior on foot. The scene finally settles into a steady movement along a dirt trail, navigating through red ferns and boulders beside an emerald green river.
